message:
feat(ext): expand ICU, misc, R-tree, and session extension stubs; add CLI introspection

Extends multiple extension crates with additional implementation scaffolding:

- ext-icu/lib.rs: Add Unicode collation and locale-aware comparison stubs
- ext-misc/lib.rs: Add miscellaneous utility function stubs (e.g., uuid, carray)
- ext-rtree/lib.rs: +109 lines expanding R-tree spatial index with constraint
  checking, node splitting heuristics, and geometry callback registration
- ext-session/lib.rs: Add session/changeset extension stubs for incremental
  change tracking
- cli/main.rs: Add introspection commands for listing loaded extensions and
  their capabilities

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
